nodes.body: Is this better? I'm not sure which part is weird to you. All the examples I'm seeing in other places look ugly, too
I found some example elsewhere and copied it, beauty be damned.

Yeah. I thought we always have some indentation in the block, like: https://github.com/cerebrotech/domino/blob/develop/e2e-tests/features/domino/apps/publish_app.feature#L64

But I guess that's not required. Your format is fine then
